title: alchemilla vulgaris var. gaillardiana
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. gaillardiana, also known as the lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the rose family, characterized by its delicate white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of the plant are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, tannins, and essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of lady's mantle include treating menstrual cramps, heavy bleeding, and menopausal symptoms due to its ability to regulate hormones and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of lady's mantle include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, calm anxiety, and promote relaxation.
